tiktok.caption: Your friends are charging you $3,200 a year and you keep paying it with a smile 😬

youtube_short.title: The $3,200 Friendship Tax Nobody Talks About
title_alternatives: Your Social Life Is Costing You $3,200 a Year
Why Your Friends Are Your Biggest Hidden Expense
youtube_short.description: Think your social life is free? Think again. Between weddings, group trips, birthday dinners, and baby showers, the average American silently spends $3,200 every year on social obligations — without budgeting a single dollar for it. Here's the breakdown nobody does the math on, and the one-move fix that actually works. Subscribe for more money traps nobody warns you about. #personalfinance #money #budgeting #socialspending #moneytips
